    <item>
      <title>Heat lose to Hornets without Bam Adebayo after potentially dirty LaMelo Ball play</title>
      <description>The Miami Heat already had their hands full with the Charlotte Hornets in the 9-10 play-in game. Their task got tougher when they lost their best player to a highly questionable play.</description>
      <pubDate>15 Apr 2026 00:32:57 -0400</pubDate>

    <item>
      <title>At 37, Rockets superstar Kevin Durant still belongs on All-NBA first team</title>
      <description>At 37, Kevin Durant continues to defy time. In his first season with the Houston Rockets, the veteran forward delivered another elite campaign, proving he remains one of the most unstoppable scorers in NBA history. </description>

    <item>
      <title>Deni Avdija's monster effort lifts Trail Blazers to play-in win, seven seed</title>

    <item>
      <title>Four NBA coaches with their jobs on the line in the playoffs</title>
      <description>Twenty teams survived the NBA regular season to reach the playoffs or play-in tournaments. That doesn't mean their coaches have job security.</description>
